name: DNSFilter
description: DNSFilter REST API for managing DNS filtering policies, domain blocking, network configuration, and DNS query log analysis

actions.name: List Filtering Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all DNS filtering policies configured in the organization

actions.name: Get Filtering Policy
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific DNS filtering policy

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: ID of the policy to retrieve

actions.name: Update Filtering Policy
actions.description: Update a DNS filtering policy including category blocks and custom domain rules

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: ID of the policy to update

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Updated policy settings including blocked categories, allow/deny domain lists, and safe search settings

actions.name: List Networks
actions.description: Retrieve all networks (sites) registered for DNS filtering

actions.name: Get Network
actions.description: Retrieve details and configuration of a specific network

parameters.name: network_id
parameters.description: ID of the network to retrieve

actions.name: Block Domain
actions.description: Add a domain to the deny list for a policy to block DNS resolution

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: ID of the policy to add the domain block to

actions.name: Allow Domain
actions.description: Add a domain to the allow list for a policy to bypass filtering

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: ID of the policy to add the domain allow to

actions.name: Get DNS Query Logs
actions.description: Retrieve DNS query logs for analysis and threat investigation

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date for log query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date for log query (ISO 8601 format)

actions.name: Get Threat Report
actions.description: Retrieve threat summary report including blocked threats by category

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date for the report period

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date for the report period
